pi_items.source: Verified by reading task.json description, verifier.py VLM prompt, and export_result.ps1, all of which use this synthetic hostname.
Verified by reading task.json description and verifier.py VLM prompt which use this synthetic IP address.
Verified by reading task.json description which explicitly asks for this synthetic username.
Verified by reading task.json description ('The connection test will fail because the server does not exist') and verifier.py VLM prompt.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring a new synthetic Linux server in ADAudit Plus with the hostname 'bastion01', IP address '192.168.1.100', and username 'audit_svc'. Because this synthetic server does not actually exist, a connection failure error is expected and must be dismissed to complete the configuration.
